$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace.
TypeScript port. Inlines a minimal citation editor using RichText; the upstream Caption utility is not vendored (single-use, post-V2 enhancement target).
Full 5-entry chain ported verbatim (v4 → v0). `migrateToQuoteV2` exported for the edit-side hook.

Upstream raw/prefix/multi-block transforms preserved; added bidirectional block transforms for core/quote ↔ artisanpack/quote and accepts artisanpack/* peers (verse, pullquote, paragraph, heading, list).
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract.

knownDivergences: edit.tsx omits the upstream `useMigrateOnLoad` hook + Caption utility. The deprecation chain still handles legacy `value`→inner-blocks migration via `migrateToQuoteV2` on block load.
